auth.birthdayPublic: Show my birthday (month and day only) on my public profile
auth.agePublic: Show my age on my public profile
auth.banAppealPlaceholder: Explain why your ban should be removed...
auth.hint.register: Email, birthday, gender, and language are required to create an account.
auth.genderRequiredSignup: Select your gender to create an account.
auth.hint.forgot: Enter the email on your account. We'll send a reset link.
auth.hint.reset: Choose a new password (at least 8 characters).
auth.hint.banAppeal: Send a message to the admin team requesting ban removal.
auth.hint.tos: Open the Terms of Service, read them, then click I've read this to continue.
auth.tos.title: Terms of Service
auth.tos.intro: Before you create an account, please read our Terms of Service.
auth.tos.acceptLabel: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service
auth.tos.mustOpen: Open and read the Terms of Service first.
auth.tos.mustAccept: Click I've read this in the Terms of Service before continuing.
auth.tos.sec.beKind.title: Be kind out there
auth.tos.sec.beKind.body: theexonet is a friendly point-and-click mining game. Treat other players with respect. No harassment, spam, scams, or trying to ruin someone else's fun.
auth.tos.sec.messages.title: Messages are not 100% private
auth.tos.sec.messages.body: Staff may read messages when needed for safety, moderation, or abuse reports. Don't assume chats are completely private — write like you're in a shared space.
auth.tos.sec.filters.title: Automatic filtering
auth.tos.sec.filters.body: We run filters for hate speech, adult or sexual content, and heated political arguments. Flagged messages can be reviewed by staff. Break the rules and you may get warnings or bans.
auth.tos.sec.account.title: Your account
auth.tos.sec.account.body: You are responsible for your account and what you post. Use a strong password and don't share it. One person per account, please.
auth.tos.sec.data.title: We don't sell your data
auth.tos.sec.data.body: We use your email and profile info to run the game — login, recovery, moderation notices, and in-game features. We do not sell your personal data to advertisers or data brokers.
auth.tos.sec.ai.title: AI-built game
auth.tos.sec.ai.body: Much of theexonet is built with AI-assisted code and content. Things may be quirky, change often, or break sometimes. That's part of the experiment.
auth.tos.sec.asis.title: As-is
auth.tos.sec.asis.body: The game is provided as-is. We do our best, but we can't promise perfect uptime, zero bugs, or that progress will never be lost if something goes wrong.
auth.tos.sec.changes.title: Changes
auth.tos.sec.changes.body: We may update these terms or game rules as theexonet grows. If you keep playing after an update, that means you're okay with the new version.
auth.tos.sec.contact.title: Questions
auth.tos.sec.contact.body: Need help or want to report a problem? Use in-game messages to staff where available, or reply to account emails we send you.
moderation.warningBody: You received a warning from moderation staff. Reason: {reason}
moderation.warningRelogin: You have a new account warning. Sign in again to review and acknowledge it.

trade.auctionsHint: List ore or supplies for auction. The timer starts when the first bid is placed. A market fee applies on completed sales.
store.title: Store
store.companyNamesHint: Buy unique company names listed by other miners. Relinquished names stay reserved for 30 days.

shipping.summary: Load ore cargo and ship it to the NPC refinery.

profile.title: theexonet Profile
profile.flaggedHint: Please update your profile content. The flag clears automatically when you save changes.
profile.friendAccepted: {name} is your friend. Message {object} from the Messages tab.
profile.edit.photoAndBannerHint: Upload a photo under your avatar. Set a wide banner from the controls in the top-right corner of the preview. Until you upload a photo, a default silhouette is chosen from your gender at sign-up.
profile.edit.photoHint: Upload your own photo anytime. Until then, a default silhouette is chosen from your gender at sign-up.
profile.edit.defaultPhotoHint: Choose a silhouette until you upload your own photo. These defaults are used whenever you have no custom upload.
profile.pronounsHintOwner: We address you as {object} and use {possessive} in game text (for example, "{possessiveCap} mine").
profile.avatarCustomShown: Your uploaded photo is shown. Default silhouettes apply when you have not uploaded a custom photo.
profile.photoChooseFirst: Choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image first.
profile.logoPngOnly: Company logo must be a PNG file.
profile.bannerChooseFirst: Choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image first.
profile.companyListNeedPrice: Enter a listing price of at least 1 {rax}.
profile.savePronounsRequired: Choose preferred pronouns for your gender selection.
profile.friendsEmptyOwner: No friends yet. Add someone from Customize Profile or the Friends menu.
profile.edit.bannerHint: Custom background behind your photo and headline. JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 4 MB. Wide images work best.
profile.edit.companyHeaderHint: Preview matches your public profile header. Use the controls below to upload photo, banner, company name, and logo.
profile.edit.companyHint: Your mine's public company name. Names must be unique. Relinquished names stay reserved for 30 days.
profile.edit.companyLogoHint: Upload a transparent PNG emblem, or generate an AI corporate logo mark from your company name and profile. Logos appear as clear art on your banner with no background box. Missing logos are queued automatically at UTC midnight.
profile.edit.listHint: Offer your current company name in the Store for other players to buy.
profile.edit.numberHint: Share this so others can add you as a friend.
profile.edit.genderHint: Used to choose how we address you in game text (he/him, she/her, they/them).
profile.edit.publicInfoHint: Choose what other players can see on your public profile and in Exonet lists. Birth year is never shared.
profile.edit.birthdayPublic: Show my birthday (month and day only) on my public profile
profile.edit.agePublic: Show my age on my public profile
profile.edit.languageHint: Interface language for menus and game text on this device.
profile.edit.pronounsRequired: Required for non-binary and prefer not to say.
profile.completion.title: Profile update required
profile.completion.intro: We need a few profile details before you continue — language, gender, and pronouns when applicable.
profile.completion.saved: Thank you! Your profile is updated.
profile.completion.pronounsRequired: Choose preferred pronouns for your gender selection.
profile.completion.localeHint: Saved to your account and applied on this device.
